allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); msgs=d.get\('msgs',[]\); print\(f'Messages: {len\(msgs\)}'\); [print\(f'  From: {m[\\"from_user_id\\"]}, Text: {m[\\"item_list\\"][0][\\"text_item\\"][\\"text\\"]}, Token: {m[\\"context_token\\"][:40]}...'\) for m in msgs]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); msgs=d.get\('msgs',[]\); print\(f'msgs: {len\(msgs\)}'\); [print\(json.dumps\({'text':m['item_list'][0]['text_item']['text'],'from':m['from_user_id'],'token':m['context_token'][:50]}\)\) for m in msgs]")
